title: costus speciosus var. formosanus
intro: Costus speciosus var. formosanus, also known as the Formosan Costus or Ceylonese Costus, is a variety of the Costus speciosus plant, a species of flowering plant in the Costaceae family. Traditionally, the plant's rhizome is used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and it is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The rhizome is often used to make herbal preparations, such as tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be taken internally to reap the plant's health benefits.
